Operation 'getCapabilities' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about what 'formats, features, and limits' means in context. Added specificity about what capabilities are returned (screenshot formats, extraction methods, video options, analysis features), clarified no authentication is needed, and explained the use case for AI agents. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented.

data.current_description: Get supported formats, features, and limits.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the API's supported formats, features, operational limits, and quota information. No authentication required. Returns a capabilities object detailing available screenshot formats, extraction methods, video recording options, analysis features, and current rate limits. Use this to determine API feature availability before making requests.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what 'formats, features, and limits' means in context. Added specificity about what capabilities are returned (screenshot formats, extraction methods, video options, analysis features), clarified no authentication is needed, and explained the use case for AI agents. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented.

message: Operation 'post_v1_scrape' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Scrape web page content' is generic and doesn't distinguish this from the GET version. Description lacks details about request format, authentication requirements, output formats, and performance considerations. Enhanced summary to emphasize 'structured content extraction' and improved description to clarify POST-specific usage, authentication, available output formats, and processing implications for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Scrape web page content including text, HTML, and links. Supports pagination for multi-page scraping.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract structured content from web pages
data.description_suggestion: Extracts structured content from a specified URL including text, HTML markup, and hyperlinks. Supports multi-page scraping through pagination parameters. Accepts a POST request with URL and extraction options. Returns extracted content in the specified format (text, HTML, markdown, or structured data). Requires valid API key authentication. Processing time depends on page complexity and pagination depth.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Scrape web page content' is generic and doesn't distinguish this from the GET version. Description lacks details about request format, authentication requirements, output formats, and performance considerations. Enhanced summary to emphasize 'structured content extraction' and improved description to clarify POST-specific usage, authentication, available output formats, and processing implications for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'get_v1_scrape' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original description is vague about what 'simple use cases' means and lacks critical details. Doesn't explain what parameters are accepted, what formats are returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced summary to clarify GET-specific usage and improved description to specify query parameter usage, available output formats, authentication, use case differentiation from POST version, and parameter constraints for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: GET version of the scrape endpoint for simple use cases.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract web page content via GET request
data.description_suggestion: Extracts web page content using a GET request for simple, single-page scraping scenarios. Accepts URL and extraction options as query parameters. Returns extracted content in the specified format (text, HTML, markdown, or structured data). Requires valid API key authentication. Ideal for quick content extraction without complex pagination or POST payload requirements. Limited to standard query parameter constraints.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'simple use cases' means and lacks critical details. Doesn't explain what parameters are accepted, what formats are returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced summary to clarify GET-specific usage and improved description to specify query parameter usage, available output formats, authentication, use case differentiation from POST version, and parameter constraints for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getBatchStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Added context about what the operation retrieves (job state, progress, results), clarified the jobId parameter purpose, and explained the polling use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a batch screenshot job identified by jobId. Returns job state (pending, processing, completed, failed), progress information, and results when available. Use this to poll for completion of batch screenshot operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Added context about what the operation retrieves (job state, progress, results), clarified the jobId parameter purpose, and explained the polling use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves the current status of an asynchronous screenshot job identified by jobId. Returns job state (pending, processing, completed, failed), progress information, and screenshot data when ready. Use this to poll for completion of async screenshot operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack clarity and specificity. Added context about job states, progress tracking, and screenshot data availability. Clarified the polling pattern for AI agents to understand this is a status-checking operation for async workflows.

data.description_suggestion: Extract content from any webpage using GET parameters as HTML, text, markdown, article, links, images, metadata, or structured data. data.current_description: Submit up to 100 URLs for batch processing. Returns a job ID to poll for results.
data.description_suggestion: Submit up to 100 URLs for asynchronous batch screenshot processing. Returns a job ID that can be used to poll for completion status and retrieve results. Processing is asynchronous; use the job ID with the appropriate status/results endpoint to monitor progress.
data.reasoning: Description mentions job ID polling but doesn't clarify the asynchronous nature or how to retrieve results. Added explicit mention of async processing, clarified that job ID is used for status monitoring, and indicated results retrieval mechanism. Helps AI agents understand the workflow and side effects (async state change).

Operation 'getCapabilities' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about what 'formats, features, and limits' means in context. Added specificity about what capabilities are returned (screenshot formats, extraction methods, video options, analysis features), clarified no authentication is needed, and explained the use case for AI agents. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented.

data.current_description: Get supported formats, features, and limits.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the API's supported formats, features, operational limits, and quota information. No authentication required. Returns a capabilities object detailing available screenshot formats, extraction methods, video recording options, analysis features, and current rate limits. Use this to determine API feature availability before making requests.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what 'formats, features, and limits' means in context. Added specificity about what capabilities are returned (screenshot formats, extraction methods, video options, analysis features), clarified no authentication is needed, and explained the use case for AI agents. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented.

message: Operation 'post_v1_scrape' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Scrape web page content' is generic and doesn't distinguish this from the GET version. Description lacks details about request format, authentication requirements, output formats, and performance considerations. Enhanced summary to emphasize 'structured content extraction' and improved description to clarify POST-specific usage, authentication, available output formats, and processing implications for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Scrape web page content including text, HTML, and links. Supports pagination for multi-page scraping.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract structured content from web pages
data.description_suggestion: Extracts structured content from a specified URL including text, HTML markup, and hyperlinks. Supports multi-page scraping through pagination parameters. Accepts a POST request with URL and extraction options. Returns extracted content in the specified format (text, HTML, markdown, or structured data). Requires valid API key authentication. Processing time depends on page complexity and pagination depth.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Scrape web page content' is generic and doesn't distinguish this from the GET version. Description lacks details about request format, authentication requirements, output formats, and performance considerations. Enhanced summary to emphasize 'structured content extraction' and improved description to clarify POST-specific usage, authentication, available output formats, and processing implications for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'get_v1_scrape' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original description is vague about what 'simple use cases' means and lacks critical details. Doesn't explain what parameters are accepted, what formats are returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced summary to clarify GET-specific usage and improved description to specify query parameter usage, available output formats, authentication, use case differentiation from POST version, and parameter constraints for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: GET version of the scrape endpoint for simple use cases.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract web page content via GET request
data.description_suggestion: Extracts web page content using a GET request for simple, single-page scraping scenarios. Accepts URL and extraction options as query parameters. Returns extracted content in the specified format (text, HTML, markdown, or structured data). Requires valid API key authentication. Ideal for quick content extraction without complex pagination or POST payload requirements. Limited to standard query parameter constraints.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'simple use cases' means and lacks critical details. Doesn't explain what parameters are accepted, what formats are returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced summary to clarify GET-specific usage and improved description to specify query parameter usage, available output formats, authentication, use case differentiation from POST version, and parameter constraints for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getBatchStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Added context about what the operation retrieves (job state, progress, results), clarified the jobId parameter purpose, and explained the polling use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a batch screenshot job identified by jobId. Returns job state (pending, processing, completed, failed), progress information, and results when available. Use this to poll for completion of batch screenshot operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. Added context about what the operation retrieves (job state, progress, results), clarified the jobId parameter purpose, and explained the polling use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'getAsyncStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. data.current_description: Retrieves the current status of an asynchronous screenshot job identified by jobId. Returns job state (pending, processing, completed, failed), progress information, and screenshot data when ready. Use this to poll for completion of async screenshot operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack clarity and specificity. Added context about job states, progress tracking, and screenshot data availability. Clarified the polling pattern for AI agents to understand this is a status-checking operation for async workflows.

data.current_description: Submit up to 100 URLs for batch processing. Returns a job ID to poll for results.
data.description_suggestion: Submit up to 100 URLs for asynchronous batch screenshot processing. Returns a job ID that can be used to poll for completion status and retrieve results. Processing is asynchronous; use the job ID with the appropriate status/results endpoint to monitor progress.
data.reasoning: Description mentions job ID polling but doesn't clarify the asynchronous nature or how to retrieve results. Added explicit mention of async processing, clarified that job ID is used for status monitoring, and indicated results retrieval mechanism.
